description: Generate a feature backlog item from a description or requirement

# Generate Feature Backlog Item

Generate a well-structured feature issue for the backlog based on the following input.

## Instructions

1. Read the provided feature description or requirement.
2. Create a GitHub feature issue following the feature issue template.
3. Include a clear summary, motivation, and concrete acceptance criteria.
4. Use the label `feature`.

## Input

${input}
